mapper.select: SELECT ma.`name` AS majorName, m.`code` AS studentCode, m.`name` AS studentName, s.academic_year AS academicYear, c.grade_letter AS gradeLetter, c.lecture_id AS lectureId FROM course c JOIN student s ON c.member_id = s.member_id JOIN major ma ON s.major_id = ma.major_id JOIN member m ON s.member_id = m.member_id WHERE c.lecture_id = #{req.lectureId} AND c.lecture_id IN( SELECT lecture_id FROM lecture WHERE member_id = #{loginUserId} )
